svg.title: Pixel Eruv — Overall System Architecture
svg.desc: All components across the public internet, nginx edge, and the internal Docker Compose network: client (Phaser + LiveKit JS), simulation plane (Pusher + World Simulator with embedded PocketBase), extensions (ext-demo, ext-walls, ext-props, ext-av), NATS bus, media plane (LiveKit SFU), persistence (PocketBase embedded in WorldSim + JetStream KV), and supporting services (MailHog, Audit, Admin portal).
svg.text: Client · nginx edge · simulation · extensions · NATS bus · media · persistence · supporting services

g.text: TLS termination · reverse proxy · static assets
All gameplay behavior — kernel only moves avatars — via NATS
Every backend service communicates through NATS — no direct service-to-service RPC

NATS is the only bus · PocketBase is embedded in WorldSim (Go library) · Extensions own all gameplay · Kernel = spatial authority + replication only · Auth = PocketBase native (email/password + OAuth2)
